reports.query: radioiodine refractory thyroid cancer transcriptomic gene expression signature
reports.limitation: Top 100 relevance-ranked results only; API rate limiting prevented exhaustive retrieval. This source is a supplementary sensitivity search, not an exhaustive database export.

reports.query: (thyroid[All Fields]) AND (radioiodine[All Fields] OR "radioactive iodine"[All Fields] OR RAIR[All Fields] OR "iodine avidity"[All Fields]) AND "Homo sapiens"[Organism]

((TITLE_ABS:"radioiodine" OR TITLE_ABS:"radioactive iodine" OR TITLE_ABS:"iodine avidity" OR TITLE_ABS:"RAIR") AND (TITLE_ABS:"thyroid cancer" OR TITLE_ABS:"thyroid carcinoma") AND (TITLE_ABS:transcriptom* OR TITLE_ABS:"gene expression" OR TITLE_ABS:signature OR TITLE_ABS:"RNA-seq" OR TITLE_ABS:microarray)) AND FIRST_PDATE:[1900-01-01 TO 2026-07-12]
